<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$RDPS$ = Health / Spawnrate
$TDPS$ = Gun DPS + Ram DPS
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 1600; 1150; 3400; 13500; 47500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 800; 525; 1000; 5000; 16000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;0
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = 2; ;2
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Quick Getaway; N/A; Tommy Goons; The Godfather
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3032133716; 3444643559; 3838914605; 3444644903
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$CREF$ = <ref name=ce>Does not account for unit DPS.</ref>
$GREF$ = <ref name=goon>Goons are not affected by any buffs or debuffs.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="7" | Crook Boss Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency$CREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.9 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.6 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.6 || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.175 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 45 || 0.15 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" | Goon Stats$GREF$
|-
! Level !! Goon !! Health !! Damage !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Detections !! Gun DPS !! Ram DPS !! Total DPS
|-
| 0-4 || [[Pistol Goon]] || 30 || 3 || 45 || 0.6 || 200 || 10 || 17 || Hidden, Flying || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|-
| 3 || [[Tommy Goon 1]] || 175 || 5 || 32.5 || 0.18 || 150 || 3 || 18.5 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Tommy Goon 2]] || 275 || 6 || 32.5 || 0.12 || 150 || 3 || 20 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="7" | Crook Boss Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency$CREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 1 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 0.6 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.6 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.2 || 16.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 18 || 0.15 || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" | Goon Stats$GREF$
|-
! Level !! Goon !! Health !! Damage !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Detections !! Gun DPS !! Ram DPS !! Total DPS
|-
| 0-4 || [[Pistol Goon]] || 25 || 2 || 50 || 0.8 || 150 || 10 || 18 || Hidden, Flying || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|-
| 3 || [[Tommy Goon 1]] || 125 || 5 || 50 || 0.25 || 200 || 4 || 20 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Tommy Goon 2]] || 225 || 8 || 50 || 0.12 || 200 || 4 || 20 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
